description: ATC slot delay caused 30 minute departure delay at DEL due to airspace congestion over northern India.
Hydraulic fluid low-pressure warning triggered during pre-flight checks on A321neo. Part replaced; delayed 50 mins.
Engine start sequence fault on left engine. Crew followed QRH; issue resolved after reset. Delayed 50 mins.
Moderate turbulence encountered at FL340 over central India. Seat-belt sign activated; 2 minor soft-tissue injuries reported.
Bird ingestion into engine No. 2 during takeoff roll at DEL. Takeoff rejected below V1. Aircraft inspected; minor FOD damage.
Aircraft landed long at COK; exited taxiway at reduced speed. No injuries; aircraft inspected and cleared.
Cabin pressure warning at FL200; auto-descent initiated per procedure. Warning was spurious (sensor fault). Replaced.
Passenger reported chest pain en-route CCU. In-flight medical kit used; doctor on board assisted. Passenger ambulanced on arrival.
Ground stop at BOM due to low-visibility fog procedure; delayed 35 mins before departure to DXB.
Late ATC clearance at BLR due to peak hour congestion.
Unattended baggage found at BOM check-in area. Bag screened; found to be misplaced checked bag. Normal departure maintained.
Severe clear-air turbulence at FL370 over Arabian Sea; 3 passengers with minor injuries. First aid administered on board.
Brake temperature advisory triggered post-landing at KTM. Normal cooling procedure followed; cleared for next sector.
Passenger dispute over reclined seat; resolved by cabin crew without diversion.
TCAS Resolution Advisory issued at FL290; crew responded correctly with climb manoeuvre. Separation maintained.
